docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SELTZER, DELORES AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SELTZER, DELORES ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00(WAIVED) SERVED JUN-03-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2008 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO SEP-26-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, HOWEVER THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO HAVING A JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THE CASE. CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR THE CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK P. SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SELTZER, DELORES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT ESTABLISH NEGLIGENCE OF DEFENDANT MUNI OR ITS DRIVER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF SELTZER, DELORES
